properties.name: Acropolis of Athens
properties.quest: Use this as a benchmark for civic architecture.

properties.name: Historic Centre of Rome
properties.summary: UNESCO-tagged urban landscape with ancient Roman core.
properties.quest: Study how ancient and modern layers overlap.

properties.name: Memphis and its Necropolis
properties.summary: UNESCO-tagged pyramid field and ancient capital landscape.
properties.quest: Map pyramids as part of a wider urban system.

properties.name: Petra
properties.summary: UNESCO-tagged rock-cut city and trade hub.
properties.quest: Ask how water creates cities in dry places.

properties.name: Persepolis
properties.quest: Read empire through reliefs and processions.

properties.name: Angkor
properties.summary: UNESCO-tagged temple and hydraulic urban landscape.
properties.quest: Study water management at civilisational scale.

properties.name: Great Zimbabwe
properties.summary: UNESCO-tagged stone-built city of southern Africa.
properties.quest: Challenge narrow ideas of ancient urbanism.
